title: Summarizing Blog Posts
scenario: Read a blog post (approx. 500-700 words) and generate a concise 2-paragraph summary. The LLM should identify the main topic, key points, and any relevant statistics or quotes. Assume the post is on a technical topic and the author is an expert in the field.
constraints: Must include the post's title and the name of the author

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output meets all the constraints provided.
Evaluate the accuracy of the summary, including the main topic, key points, and any relevant statistics or quotes.
Assess the tone of the summary, ensuring it is conversational and engaging.
Evaluate the formatting of the output, ensuring it is concise and clear.
